title: Seagrass Tank Basket for Toilet Paper 3 Sections Woven Storage Basket with Large Compartment (Natural 42cm x 14cm x 9cm)
features: The storage basket is made of 100% natural handwoven seagrass, insert metal frame for firm and keep shape; designed with lid for storage; 3 compartments for organizing
Package include one seagrass basket: 42cm x 14cm x 9cm
Great for tabletop or shelf organize small stuff like keys, cosmetics or put in wardrobe drawer for storing underwear or socks; Also could be used in washroom to organize toilet papers
Multifunction: Can used as storage bins, hamper baskets, shelf organizer boxes, storage box, toilet tank basket
Natural Color, versatile storage rattan basket, ideal for any home or office
